overview: Maverick Digitals is a premium multi-page agency website with a cinematic dark theme inspired by hashgraphvc.com, featuring word-by-word scroll text reveals, ambient glow effects, animated stat counters, horizontal marquee strips, and smooth easing across all 5 pages.
features: Dark premium theme (#080808 background, amber and teal accents)
Word-by-word scroll text reveals on all section headings
Animated stat counters that count up when scrolled into view
Horizontal scrolling marquee strips with services and brand values
Atmospheric ambient glow effects in hero and section areas
Transparent header that frosts and darkens on scroll
3D spiral scroll animation on Services page
Fully functional contact form with validation
Team profiles for Muskan Rathod and Dhaval Shah
